name: Choreograph
description:
Meta-sequencer for Roll20 tokens. Define scenes in handouts -- filter tokens, compute per-token timing, and fire commands at the right moments. Designed to orchestrate animations and effects across groups of tokens with spatial propagation, staggering, and parameterizable timing.

Requires: SelectManager.

Scenes are stored in [Scene] handouts, casts in [Cast] handouts.

Commands:
- `!choreograph run <name>` -- execute a scene on selected tokens
- `!choreograph new <name>` -- create a blank scene handout
- `!choreograph list` -- list all scenes
- `!choreograph edit <name>` -- open scene handout
- `!choreograph delete <name>` -- delete a scene
- `!choreograph stop` -- stop all running scenes

See the Help: Choreograph handout (generated on startup) for full documentation.
